title: taxaceae
intro: The Taxaceae rank is a family of coniferous plants, commonly known as yews and cedarberries. This family is characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and fleshy, berry-like fruit. Taxaceae contains around 15-20 genera, including Taxus and Torreya. The plants within this family are often found in temperate and subarctic regions, and are known for their unique and often toxic properties.
